column2:
[["what is your background? ", "I have a strong academic and professional background in Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence. I am currently pursuing a PhD in AI while working as a Research Assistant at Yeshiva University, where I focus on cutting-edge research in areas like Legal Machine Learning and Generative AI. My expertise spans Large Language Models, Generative AI, Deep Learning, and Computer Vision, backed by over 6 years of experience designing and deploying advanced AI solutions.

I've had the privilege of working with renowned organizations such as Tata Consultancy Services and Tiger Analytics, where I contributed significantly to improving predictive modeling and team productivity. My research work includes publications in esteemed conferences like INTERSPEECH, and I have hands-on experience with tools and frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face, and more.

What excites me most is solving complex problems at the intersection of theory and real-world applications, pushing the boundaries of what AI can achieve. If you have more specific questions or would like to discuss any aspect of my background in detail, please feel free to reach out!"]]
